assistant_examples.outcome: Generate an explicit enabled draft with python runner defaults and the minimal default review scope.
assistant_examples.user: Enable Goal Gate with the smolagents reviewer and keep three continue attempts.

assistant_examples.outcome: Keep the host transparent and add only the explicit context.inject allowance to allowed_actions.
assistant_examples.user: Add context.inject so the reviewer may propose a continuation patch, but keep everything explicit.

assistant_examples.outcome: Expand allowed_inputs only because the user explicitly requested a broader review scope.
assistant_examples.user: Authorize fuller redacted context including changed files and verification summary.

config_schema.description: Explicit host-side Goal Gate configuration for AI-in-the-loop goal completion review. Default-off: nothing is intercepted, injected, persisted, or sent to an external runner unless enabled here.

allowed_actions.description: Proposal actions that the host is willing to accept from the external reviewer. Actions outside this list are rejected even if the steward spec declared them.

oneOf.description: Allow the executor to mark the goal complete.
oneOf.title: Approve Complete

oneOf.description: Block completion because work or verification is still missing.
oneOf.title: Reject Complete

oneOf.description: Return an explicit follow-up instruction when completion is rejected.
oneOf.title: Request Continue

oneOf.description: Attach a redacted diagnostic note for audit or later review.
oneOf.title: Create Diagnosis Note

oneOf.description: Reference a hashed external artifact in the audit ledger.
oneOf.title: Create Ledger Artifact

oneOf.description: Optional advanced action: inject explicit follow-up guidance into the next continuation step. Do not enable unless the host explicitly supports and wants it.
oneOf.title: Inject Context

allowed_actions.title: Allowed Proposal Actions

allowed_inputs.description: Redacted event fields that the host is allowed to pass to the external reviewer. The event is rejected if it includes undeclared inputs.

oneOf.description: Required machine-readable goal status, attempt count, cooldown, and dedupe state.
oneOf.title: Goal State

oneOf.description: Short human-readable summary of what the executor claims to have completed.
oneOf.title: Work Summary

oneOf.description: Redacted focused test outcomes or command summaries relevant to goal completion.
oneOf.title: Test Results

oneOf.description: Outstanding blockers, gaps, or known missing verification steps.
oneOf.title: Blockers

oneOf.description: Recent redacted execution or verification trace snippets for context.
oneOf.title: Recent Trace

oneOf.description: Relevant changed file paths or redacted file-level summaries.
oneOf.title: Changed Files

oneOf.description: High-level summary of broader verification or deployment status.
oneOf.title: Verification Summary

oneOf.description: Original user objective or acceptance target in concise redacted form.
oneOf.title: User Goal

allowed_inputs.title: Allowed Event Inputs

cooldown_seconds.description: Explicit host-side default when event.goal_state omitted cooldown. Set to 0 to disable host-side cooldown by default.
cooldown_seconds.title: Cooldown Seconds

enabled.description: Default-off switch for host-side Goal Gate interception.
enabled.title: Enable Goal Gate

hook.description: Explicit lifecycle hook that may invoke Goal Gate when enabled.
hook.title: Lifecycle Hook

max_continue_attempts.description: Explicit host-side default when event.goal_state omitted a limit. Set to 0 to leave the limit entirely to event.goal_state.
max_continue_attempts.title: Max Continue Attempts

runner.description: External command that receives the redacted Goal Gate event on stdin and must return a structured steward proposal on stdout.

args.description: Explicit argument list passed to the runner command.
args.title: Runner Arguments

command.description: Executable to launch, for example python, node, or a dedicated sidecar binary.
command.title: Runner Command

workdir.description: Explicit working directory for the external runner. Relative values should be resolved by the host against the config file location.
workdir.title: Runner Working Directory

runner.title: External Runner

config_schema.title: Gateway Harness Goal Gate Config

description: Single host-facing bundle for wiring Goal Gate configuration, UI rendering, and result handling.

reject_result.continue_instruction: Deploy the image and run the smoke test.

form_model.description: Host-facing form model for explicit Goal Gate completion review configuration.

sections.description: Turn Goal Gate on explicitly and select the lifecycle hook.

fields.description: Default-off master switch for host-side completion interception.
fields.title: Enable Goal Gate

fields.description: Explicit lifecycle point where Goal Gate may run. See hook_catalog for the broader Harness hook map and localized explanations.

options.description: Fires when an executor is about to mark a goal complete, so an external reviewer can decide whether completion is justified.

descriptions.en-US: Fires when an executor is about to mark a goal complete, so an external reviewer can decide whether completion is justified.
descriptions.zh-CN: 在执行器准备把目标标记为完成前触发，适合 AI in the loop 审查工作是否真的闭环。

options.example: Example: after tests pass, ask a reviewer whether deployment, acceptance, or regression checks are still missing.
options.title: Before Complete

fields.title: Lifecycle Hook

sections.title: Activation

sections.description: Configure the external AI reviewer process. Gateway Harness does not embed a model or agent runtime.

fields.description: Executable to launch, for example python or a dedicated sidecar binary.
fields.title: Runner Command

fields.description: Optional working directory. Relative paths should be resolved against the config file location.
fields.title: Runner Working Directory

fields.description: Explicit argument list for the external runner.
fields.title: Runner Arguments

sections.title: Runner

sections.description: Choose what redacted context the reviewer may see and what actions it may propose.

fields.description: Only these redacted input fields may be passed to the external reviewer. Default to the minimal summary set; broader context must be explicitly opted in.

options.description: Required machine-readable goal status and retry state.
options.title: Goal State

options.description: Focused test outcomes or command summaries.
options.title: Test Results

options.description: Known missing pieces or unresolved blockers.
options.title: Blockers

options.description: Relevant changed file paths or summaries.
options.title: Changed Files

options.description: Original user objective in concise redacted form.
options.title: User Goal

fields.title: Allowed Event Inputs

fields.description: Only these actions may be accepted from the external reviewer.

options.description: Reference a hashed artifact in the ledger.
options.title: Create Ledger Artifact

options.description: Optional advanced action for explicit follow-up guidance only.
options.title: Inject Context

fields.title: Allowed Proposal Actions

sections.title: Review Scope

sections.description: Prevent infinite continue loops and keep retries explicit.

fields.description: Host-side default retry limit when the event omitted one.
fields.title: Max Continue Attempts

fields.description: Host-side default cooldown between repeated continuation attempts.
fields.title: Cooldown Seconds

sections.title: Safety Limits

form_model.title: Gateway Harness Goal Gate
form_model.transparency_note: Default-off. Unless enabled here, Goal Gate must not invoke an external runner, intercept completion, inject context, or write ledger records.

form_schema.description: Optional host-facing form model for rendering Goal Gate configuration without hardcoding frontend field order, grouping, or control hints.
form_schema.title: Gateway Harness Goal Gate Form Model

en-US.example: Example: after compaction, inject a short project-constraint summary when continuity drops sharply.
en-US.summary: Fires when the host detects a meaningful continuity loss, so policy can inject a short reminder or summary explicitly.
en-US.title: Context Continuity Drop

zh-CN.example: 例如：压缩后发现上下文断崖下降，再补一条简短的项目约束摘要。
zh-CN.summary: 当宿主检测到会话上下文明显断裂时触发，适合显式注入短摘要或连续性提醒。
zh-CN.title: 上下文连续性下降

en-US.example: Example: inject a stable system capsule before failover aliases or channel routing expand the model name.
en-US.summary: Runs before the host maps a logical request model to an upstream model, which is useful for model-family-aware context programming.
en-US.title: Request Before Model Mapping

zh-CN.example: 例如：在 failover 或别名展开前，先按模型标签注入固定系统提示词。
zh-CN.summary: 在宿主把逻辑模型名映射到具体上游模型前运行，适合按逻辑模型或标签做显式上下文编程。
zh-CN.title: 请求模型映射前

en-US.example: Example: append project constraints, format instructions, or safety reminders just before forwarding.
en-US.summary: Runs immediately before the final request leaves for the upstream provider, making it the last explicit mutation point.
en-US.title: Request Before Upstream

zh-CN.example: 例如：在真正转发给模型前追加项目边界、输出格式或安全提醒。
zh-CN.summary: 在最终请求发往上游前运行，适合做最后一层显式上下文注入或审计补丁。
zh-CN.title: 请求上游前

en-US.example: Example: add a stable language or formatting capsule for a chat-model family before routing.
en-US.summary: Chat Completions variant of the pre-mapping hook, for explicit mutation before the host resolves the upstream model.
en-US.title: Chat Before Model Mapping

zh-CN.example: 例如：对某类 chat 模型统一补一条中文输出约束。
zh-CN.summary: 面向 Chat Completions 请求，在模型映射前做显式上下文编程。
zh-CN.title: Chat 模型映射前

en-US.example: Example: add a last-mile reminder to preserve tool-call protocol before sending upstream.
en-US.summary: Chat Completions variant of the final pre-upstream mutation point.
en-US.title: Chat Before Upstream

zh-CN.example: 例如：在发给上游前追加“保持工具调用协议不变”的提醒。
zh-CN.summary: 面向 Chat Completions 请求，在最终转发前做最后一层显式补丁。
zh-CN.title: Chat 上游前

en-US.example: Example: inject repository constraints for a coding model family before stateful Responses routing resolves upstream.
en-US.summary: Responses endpoint variant of the pre-mapping hook for model-aware context programming.
en-US.title: Responses Before Model Mapping

zh-CN.example: 例如：在 stateful Responses 路由前，为 coding 模型补充仓库约束。
zh-CN.summary: 面向 Responses 请求，在宿主解析具体上游模型前运行，适合基于逻辑模型名注入约束。
zh-CN.title: Responses 模型映射前

en-US.example: Example: add a last-mile reminder to preserve the project goal before the request leaves the gateway.
en-US.summary: Responses endpoint variant of the final pre-upstream mutation point.
en-US.title: Responses Before Upstream

zh-CN.example: 例如：在请求真正出站前，补一条保持项目目标不漂移的提醒。
zh-CN.summary: 面向 Responses 请求，在最终上游调用前运行，适合最后一跳的显式上下文注入。
zh-CN.title: Responses 上游前

en-US.example: Example: inject a short capsule that preserves user intent and unfinished work before compact routing resolves upstream.
en-US.summary: Compact-request variant of the pre-mapping hook, for explicit continuity handling before model routing.
en-US.title: Compact Before Model Mapping

zh-CN.example: 例如：在 compact 请求进上游前，统一注入“保留用户目标和未完成事项”的短摘要。
zh-CN.summary: 专门面向 compact/压缩请求，在模型映射前运行，适合压缩场景的显式上下文归一化。
zh-CN.title: 压缩请求模型映射前

en-US.example: Example: inject a short prompt distilled from ledger summaries whenever a compact event is emitted.
en-US.summary: Compact-request variant of the final pre-upstream hook, useful for the last explicit continuity patch before compaction leaves the gateway.
en-US.title: Compact Before Upstream

zh-CN.example: 例如：每次压缩事件发生时，显式注入由账本摘要提炼出的短提示词。
zh-CN.summary: 专门面向 compact/压缩请求，在最终上游调用前运行，适合做最后一层连续性补丁。
zh-CN.title: 压缩请求上游前

en-US.example: Example: after tests pass, ask a reviewer whether deployment, acceptance, or regression checks are still missing.
en-US.summary: Fires when an executor is about to mark a goal complete, so an external reviewer can decide whether completion is justified.
en-US.title: Before Complete

zh-CN.example: 例如：测试刚跑完时先让外部 reviewer 判断是否还缺部署、验收或回归验证。
zh-CN.summary: 在执行器准备把目标标记为完成前触发，适合 AI in the loop 审查工作是否真的闭环。
zh-CN.title: 完成前审查

en-US.example: Example: before resuming a coding task, let AI inspect blockers, goal state, and recent trace, then produce a short continuation prompt.
en-US.summary: Fires before a rejected, paused, or compacted goal resumes, which is useful for continuity normalization before work continues.
en-US.title: Before Resume

zh-CN.example: 例如：继续上一轮编码前，先由 AI 检查 blockers、目标状态和最近 trace，再生成短继续提示。
zh-CN.summary: 在被拒绝、挂起或压缩后的目标准备恢复执行前触发，适合先归一化上下文，再决定下一步。
zh-CN.title: 恢复前审查

en-US.example: Example: after the goal completes, generate a redacted delivery summary artifact and attach it to the ledger.
en-US.summary: Fires after a goal is already complete, which is useful for post-completion audit, tagging, or artifact generation rather than blocking completion itself.
en-US.title: After Complete

zh-CN.example: 例如：goal 真正完成后，再生成一条脱敏交付摘要并挂到 ledger。
zh-CN.summary: 在目标已经完成后触发，适合补审计摘要、项目标签或后处理 artifact，而不是拦截完成动作本身。
zh-CN.title: 完成后观察

result_schema.description: Explicit host-facing result contract for Goal Gate execution. Covers approve, reject/continue, and structured failure paths.

enabled.description: Whether Goal Gate was enabled in the host config.

triggered.description: Whether Goal Gate actually triggered for this execution attempt.

result_schema.title: Gateway Harness Goal Gate Result

title: Gateway Harness Goal Gate Host Bundle
transparency_note: Default-off. Unless enabled by explicit host config, Goal Gate must not call an external runner, intercept completion, inject continuation context, or append ledger records.
